content: Phase 1 Step 1: Convert CRA to Next.js + TypeScript, set up env vars, backend passthrough
Phase 1 Step 2: Shared utilities (formatMoney, fmtDate, fmtTime, Supabase clients)
Phase 2 Step 4: Landing Page (adapt TSX, fix hrefs, replace images)
Phase 2 Step 7: Stripe Checkout endpoint (Next.js API route)
Phase 2 Step 8: Stripe Webhook (Next.js API route)
Phase 2: End-to-end testing of public pages
Phase 3 Step 9: Account User Login (phone + OTP)
Phase 6 Steps 24-26: Final pass (routing, realtime, mobile)
